message.content:
@startuml
title af sync strategy ReferencePage
Strategy:
1. AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW
2. AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW
3. AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW tuning file not contain

autonumber

participant "af_core" as af_core
participant "af_haf" as af_haf
participant "camxhafadapter" as camxhafadapter
participant "af_haf_default_mixer" as af_haf_default_mixer
participant "af_haf_follower" as af_haf_follower

note right of af_haf
  how the follower create
end note

af_haf -> af_haf: af_haf_set_core_switch
activate af_haf

af_haf -> camxhafadapter: pAlgo->set_parameters
type: AF_HAF_SET_PARAM_PEER_FOCUS_INFO
activate camxhafadapter

camxhafadapter -> af_haf_default_mixer: af_default_mixer_set_parameters
activate af_haf_default_mixer

note right of af_haf_default_mixer
  if !master:
    pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_follower_algo
  else
    pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_active_algo
end
end note

af_haf_default_mixer --> af_haf: return
deactivate af_haf_default_mixer

af_haf --> af_core: return
deactivate af_haf

note right of af_haf
  af process monitor
end note

af_core -> af_haf: af_follower_process_monitor
activate af_haf

note right of af_haf
  checked with Lester
  for follower_monitor, has no different
  for follower_search,
  current we use LEGACY, and Direct mapping require module calibration data
end note

alt [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_LEGACY_MAPPING]
  af_haf --> af_core: return
else [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING]
  af_haf --> af_core: return
end

note right of af_haf
  af process search
end note

af_core -> af_haf: af_follower_process_search
activate af_haf

af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_focus_converge
activate af_haf

note right of af_haf
  just talk about the FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING
end note

alt [case AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW]
  af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_focus_coarse_follow_dir_map
  activate af_haf

  note right of af_haf
    1. if Coarse search ongoing, Fine search not in process
    go to the target lenspos
    2. if enter fine search, setup fine search
    follower have seperate fine search Tuning Param
  end note

  af_haf --> af_haf: return
  deactivate af_haf

  [case AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW]
  af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_focus_complete_follow_dir_map
  activate af_haf

  note right of af_haf
    once master focusStatus is FOCUSED
    we directly set LensPos
  end note

  af_haf --> af_haf: return
  deactivate af_haf

  [case AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW]
  af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_focus_sequential_follow_dir_map
  activate af_haf

  note right of af_haf
    just like COMPLETE_FOLLOW, but even master is focus done
    will do another fine search
  end note

  af_haf --> af_haf: return
  deactivate af_haf

  af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_get_fine_range
  activate af_haf

  af_haf --> af_haf: return
  deactivate af_haf

  af_haf -> af_haf: af_follower_populate_process_search_output
  activate af_haf

  af_haf --> af_haf: return
  deactivate af_haf

end

af_haf --> af_core: return
deactivate af_haf

@enduml
